name: Ramos Fizz
recipeIngredient: 2 Dash Orange Juice (or Orange Flower Water)
4 oz Club Soda; or to Fill Cracked Ice
recipeInstructions: Fill a mixing glass with cracked ice. Add gin, cream, lemon juice, egg white, powdered sugar, and orange juice. Shake well and strain into a chilled Collins glass. Top with club soda.
